title: ixora zippeliana
intro: Ixora zippeliana, also known as the Philippine ixora or Zippel's flame, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, cough, and sore throats. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate respiratory issues and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Ixora zippeliana, such as teas and infusions, can be used to support immune function and provide relief from various health conditions.
